name: Speedy's Truck Stop
description: Independent 24-hour truck stop at the New Mexico state line in Lupton with a diner known for Navajo tacos, fuel islands, showers and a laundromat.

name: I-40 Sanders Port of Entry (Weigh Station)
description: Arizona Department of Transportation commercial port of entry and truck scale on westbound I-40 near Sanders, around mile marker 340, with PrePass bypass.

name: Chambers Mobil
description: 24-hour Mobil fuel stop and convenience store at the I-40/US-191 junction in Chambers offering diesel and commercial fleet fueling.

name: Hopi Travel Plaza
description: Long-running independent Native-nation travel plaza in Holbrook at the Hwy 77 exit with truck fuel islands, convenience store, showers and laundry for drivers.

name: TA Holbrook
description: TravelCenters of America full-service travel center at I-40 Exit 283 in Holbrook with Shell diesel, truck parking, showers, a Popeyes and a 24-hour truck service shop.

name: Love's Travel Stop #278
description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-40 Exit 277 in Joseph City serving the Holbrook-Winslow corridor with diesel, truck parking, showers and a store deli.

name: Love's Travel Stop #971
description: Newer Love's Travel Stop at I-40 Exit 255 in Winslow with 81 truck spaces, diesel bays, showers, laundry, a CAT scale and Arby's/Dunkin' inside.

name: Flying J Travel Center #612
description: Pilot Flying J travel center at I-40 Exit 255 in Winslow with a Denny's, many truck parking spaces, showers, laundry, a CAT scale and on-site tire/truck service.

name: Pilot Travel Center (Flying J) - Bellemont
description: Full-service Pilot/Flying J travel center at I-40 Exit 185 in Bellemont, just west of Flagstaff, with diesel lanes, showers, an on-site CAT scale, McDonald's and Subway.

name: Little America Travel Center - Flagstaff
description: Long-established Little America truck plaza and hotel off I-40 Exit 198 (Butler Ave) in Flagstaff, offering 24-hour diesel fueling, showers, laundry and a restaurant.

name: CAT Scale - Pilot Bellemont
description: Certified CAT Scale for truck weighing located at the Pilot Travel Center at I-40 Exit 185 in Bellemont.

name: Bellemont Truck Repair & Towing
description: Heavy-duty truck and trailer repair shop with 24-hour emergency road service, towing and tire work, located near I-40 Exit 185 across from the Pilot truck stop in Bellemont.

name: Rocky Mountain Truck Centers - Flagstaff
description: Heavy-duty and semi-truck mobile repair shop located next to Little America just off I-40 in Flagstaff, offering 24-hour roadside diesel mechanic service.

name: Golightly Tire
description: Full-service commercial and truck tire dealer in east Flagstaff serving the I-40 corridor with tire sales, service and mobile tire repair.

name: I-40 Truck Wash
description: Truck and RV power-wash service in Flagstaff near the I-17 and I-40 junction using biodegradable detergents, by appointment.
